subcodes.first_line: Say: O God of the worlds! I beseech Thee by the Most Great Name, whereby ecstasy hath seized the dwellers in the cities of names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی یا اله العالم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی به اخذ الانجذاب سکان مدائن الاسما
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
